name: KITO Corporation
summary: KITO Corporation manufactures, constructs, sells, repairs, and maintains material handling equipment in Japan, the Americas, China, rest of Asia, Europe, and internationally. The company offers manual and electric chain hoists, lever hoists, wire rope hoists, cranes, chain slings, and other below-the-hook devices. Its products are used in various workplaces, including construction sites, industrial factories, power plants, and entertainment facilities, as well as in the agriculture, forestry, and fishery industries. The company also engages in the engineering and construction management. KITO Corporation was founded in 1932 and is headquartered in Nakakoma, Japan.
